K9Grass® – Antimicrobial, clean, and durable turf for dogs.

Playground Grass™ – Safe, cushioned, and IPEMA-certified for kids.

SportsGrass® – High-performance turf for athletic fields.

ForeverLawn® Landscape – Lush, low-maintenance lawns.

GolfGreens® – Professional-grade putting surfaces.

Our expert installations offer long-lasting, eco-friendly solutions. Contact ForeverLawn Indy today to transform your space!

businessData.description:
Heath Outdoor is a locally owned, full service landscaping company serving commercial & residential customers throughout the Indianapolis metropolitan area, as well as Hamilton County, Hendricks County, Boone County and Johnson County.
Design and build services include:
Custom gardens and landscapes, landscape lighting, paver patios & walkways, water features and recreation ponds, outdoor fire features, outdoor kitchens, pool and spa vaults, tiny houses, storage sheds, pergolas and decks, retaining walls & fencing.
Commercial and residential property maintenance services include:
Mowing, mulching, planting & watering service, irrigation & drainage system installation & repairs, seasonal property clean-ups, and snow & ice management.
